sectiondef.header: Register offsets for the CAN. Each register is 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: TX High Priority Buf Data Word 1.
TX High Priority Buf Data Word 2.
RX FIFO two bit ECC error.
RX FIFO one bit ECC error.
TXOL FIFO two bit ECC error.
TXOL FIFO one bit ECC error.
TXTL FIFO two bit ECC error.
TXTL FIFO one bit ECC error.
RX FIFO Not Empty Intr Mask.

memberdef.name: XCAN_IXR_ALL
memberdef.initializer: (XCAN_IXR_WKUP_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_SLP_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_BSOFF_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_ERROR_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_RXNEMP_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_RXOFLW_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_RXUFLW_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_RXOK_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_TXBFLL_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_TXFLL_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_TXOK_MASK | \ XCAN_IXR_ARBLST_MASK)

sectiondef.header: CAN Frame Identifier (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX/Acceptance Filter
CAN Frame Data Length Code (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)
CAN Frame Data Word 1 (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)
CAN Frame Data Word 2 (TX High Priority Buffer/TX/RX)

briefdescription.para: Reset Mask for ECC configuration register.
Reset RX FIFO ECC error counters.
Reset TXOL FIFO ECC error counters.
Reset TXTL FIFO ECC error counters.
Maximum CAN frame length in bytes.

sectiondef.header: Mask for Low 16bits and High 16 bits

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be read

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: u32 XCan_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

briefdescription.para: This macro writes the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the register offset to be written
is the 32-bit value to write to the register

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: u32 XCan_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data);
